title: Nestle Nigeria Holds 53rd AGM Tomorrow
description: Nestle Nigeria Plc will hold its 53rd Annual General Meeting (AGM) at its Head Office, 22-24, Industrial Avenue, Ilupeju, Lagos on Wednesday, June 29, 2022 at 11 am. According to the company “further
html:
Nestle Nigeria Plc will hold its 53rd Annual General Meeting (AGM) at its Head Office, 22-24, Industrial Avenue, Ilupeju, Lagos on Wednesday, June 29, 2022 at 11 am.

According to the company “further to the directive of the Government on the restriction of social/public gatherings as a result of the COVID-19 pandemic, the Company engaged the regulators at the AGM so as to ensure adherence to the regulatory framework while significantly reducing health hazards that could be aggravated by such gatherings”.

“In view of the above, we are pleased to inform you that the Corporate Affairs Commission has granted approval for the AGM to hold with ATTENDANCE BY PROXIES to minimize physical contact. Shareholders are therefore advised to kindly appoint proxies, from preselected proxies stated in the AR & CFS 2021 to represent them at the meeting”.
